# opnsense_quagga_ospf_redistribution (Data Source)

Configure OSPF redistribution.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID of the resource.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) An optional description for this redistribution.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable this redistribution.
- `linked_route_map` (String) UUID of the route map to apply.
- `redistribute` (String) The protocol to redistribute.
